Interface IUserMails

public interface IUserMails

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    addMail(AMailEntry mailEntry)
    Add a new AMailEntry to the users mails

    Retrieve a AMailEntry for the given hash
    Map<String, ? extends AMailEntry>

    Retrieve all registered mails for that user

    Remove a AMailEntry from the users mails that matches the given hash

    userId()
     

  • Method Details

    • getMail

      Optional<? extends AMailEntry> getMail(String hash)
      Retrieve a AMailEntry for the given hash
      Parameters:
      hash - The hash of the mail entry to retrieve
      Returns:
      An optional containing the mail entry if found, empty otherwise

    • addMail

      void addMail(AMailEntry mailEntry)
      Add a new AMailEntry to the users mails
      Parameters:
      mailEntry - The mail entry to add

    • removeMail

      boolean removeMail(String mailHash)
      Remove a AMailEntry from the users mails that matches the given hash
      Parameters:
      mailHash - The hash of the AMailEntry to remove
      Returns:
      True if the mail was removed, false otherwise

    • mails

      Map<String, ? extends AMailEntry> mails()
      Retrieve all registered mails for that user
      Returns:
      An unmodifiable map of mail hashes to mail entries

    • userId

      long userId()
